rationale.R1.5: The agent cleaned up the text by tightening sentences, removing redundancies, and improving punctuation but did not propose a new structural plan.
rationale.R1.7: No citation-level engagement was present; the agent neither audited citations nor flagged missing works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty about specific details like ChEMBL release and BPE size but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate changes with sources or reasons beyond minor edits.
